title: WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Educates, identifies, and assists women in accessing mammogram vouchers. Provides care coordination and navigation of ScreenWise services. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Women age 40 and older who have not had a mammogram in the past year or at all ScreenWise services: Women age 50 and older and needing breast or cervical cancer screening or diagnostic services. Must have a household income at or below 250% of Federal Poverty Level, and must either have no health insurance or have health insurance, but not enough to cover their needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Mammograms Medical Care Expense Assistance * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES
